title: All Night Long
why_this_song: All Night Long by Lionel Richie (1983) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 81 times; first heard in: "All night long (all night), All night (all night)"
Appears 18 times; first heard in: "All night long (all night), All night (all night)"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "Let the music play on...(Play on, play on, play on.)"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "We're going to Party, Karamu, Fiesta, forever"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Everybody sing, everybody dance"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "night" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "night" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "long" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "long" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Come on and sing my song!

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Lionel Richie one question about "All Night Long", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Lionel Richie sobre "All Night Long", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "All Night Long" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "All Night Long" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "All Night Long" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "All Night Long" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
